dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7573 IH: Modernize SSI Stipends Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Dexter (for herself and Mr. Carey) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend title XVI of the Social Security Act to adjust the minimum monthly personal needs allowances for institutionalized individuals and couples under the supplemental security income program, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Modernize SSI Stipends Act.

section.header: Adjustment of the minimum monthly personal needs allowances for institutionalized individuals and couples under the SSI program

paragraph.text: Section 1611(e)(1)(B) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1382(e)(1)(B)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: in each of clauses (i) and (ii)(I) by striking $360 and inserting $720; and
in clause (iii), by striking $720 and inserting $1,440.

paragraph.text: The amendments made by paragraph (1) shall apply with respect to benefits for months after December 31, 2025.
Section 1617(a)(1) of such Act (42 U.S.C. 1382f(a)(1)) is amended by striking and (b)(2) and inserting (b)(2), and (e)(1)(B).

Section 1611(e)(1)(B) of such Act (42 U.S.C. 1382(e)(1)(B)) is amended in each of clauses (i) through (iii) by inserting (or, if greater, the amount determined under section 1617) after each dollar amount specified in such clauses.
The amendments made by this subsection shall apply with respect to benefit amount increases for months after December 31, 2025.
Section 1618(g) of such Act (42 U.S.C. 1382g(g)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by striking 1987 each place it appears and inserting 2025; and

in paragraph (4)(B), by striking increased— and all that follows and inserting increased by the amount of all cost-of-living adjustments under section 1617 to benefits determined under section 1611(e)(1)(B) which have occurred after September 2025 and before that particular month..

paragraph.text: The amendments made by paragraph (1) shall take effect on January 1, 2026.
